nodes.context: Mexican American prison gang founded in early 1980s in Texas, active in Texas prisons and Mexico, involved in drug trafficking.
Splinter faction of HPL consisting of original members from the Rio Grande Valley.
Splinter faction of HPL consisting of members from San Antonio and Houston.

edges.evidence_quote: The original HPL members decided to call themselves the HPL 45s, while the San Antonio and Houston members were known as the 16/12s.
edges.context: HPL 45s is a splinter faction of HPL.

edges.evidence_quote: The original HPL members decided to call themselves the HPL 45s, while the San Antonio and Houston members were known as the 16/12s.
edges.context: 16/12s is a splinter faction of HPL.

edges.evidence_quote: The two factions went to war and finally reunited under the name HPL in 1998.
edges.context: HPL 45s and 16/12s were in conflict with each other.
